demographic_profile.summary: Enterprise security professionals responsible for implementing and managing organizational security tools, with focus on AI usage monitoring and threat detection. They prioritize solutions that provide comprehensive visibility, integrate well with existing infrastructure, and meet compliance requirements. Their frustrations center on tool sprawl, integration complexity, and the need for actionable intelligence from security data.
